steps.title: Read the bar height at 0 kWh
steps.content: At the 0 kWh charge level on the bar graph, the bar height is 6 days. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice D is correct. It's given that the bar graph summarizes the charge, in kilowatt-hours $\left(\text{kWh}\right)$, a battery received each day for $15$ days. The height of each bar in the bar graph shown represents the number of days the battery received the charge, in $\text{kWh}$, specified at the bottom of the bar. The bar for a charge of $0\text{kWh}$ reaches a height of $6$. Therefore, the battery received a charge of $0\text{kWh}$ for $6$ of these days.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the charge, in $\text{kWh}$, that the battery received, not the number of days the battery received this charge.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the number of days the battery received a charge of either $8$, $16$, or $23$ $\text{kWh}$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the number of days the battery received a charge of $11$ $\text{kWh}$.
